problem_solved: Clinicians need point-of-care access to current, evidence-based clinical information for diagnosis and treatment decisions
solution_description: Evidence-based clinical reference tool providing current disease, drug, and condition information. Part of EBSCO Health, offering clinical decision support integrated into EHR workflows. Peer-reviewed content updated regularly
traction_signals: EBSCO's established library and healthcare presence
notes: Alternative to UpToDate in the clinical decision support space. EBSCO ownership provides distribution through existing library/healthcare channels
